subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the horizon of manifestation! Hearken unto the call of Him Who conversed on Sinai, for He hath spoken that whereby His decree was made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی افق الظهور اسمع ندآء مکلم الطور انه نطق بما ظهر منه حکم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @chastisement and requital, @call to action
